title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!
